# docs-orchestrator

Documentation workflow orchestrator — reads step list from YAML, runs steps sequentially with progress tracking, iteration loops, and confirmation gates

**Plugin**: [docs-skills](index.md) | **:material-check: User-invocable**

## Usage

```bash
/docs-orchestrator
```
